title: canthium horridum
intro: Canthium horridum, also known as the yellow thron tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Canthium horridum include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. Canthium horridum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, making it a versatile plant with multiple applications in traditional medicine.
